title: JSON Path Query
description: Write a function that evaluates a simple JSON path expression against a JavaScript value and returns the matched value. Supported syntax: dot notation for object property access (e.g. 'a.b.c'), bracket notation for array index access (e.g. 'items[0]'), and combinations thereof (e.g. 'a.items[1].name'). The path starts from the root object. If any segment of the path does not exist, return undefined.
